package rulecoverage

func NegativeReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserialize() string {
    ruleID := "readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_deserialize"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that materialize c.Request.Body with io.ReadAll(...) and then bind the same body again."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
